label.name: GOAT RECORDS
label.tagline: Built for Greatness. Powered by Sound.
label.description: GOAT RECORDS was born from one relentless vision: to build the most dominant music label on the continent. We don't chase charts — we create them. Founded by artists, for artists, we operate at the intersection of raw talent and strategic excellence.
label.description2: From underground cyphers to main-stage headliners, every act we sign carries the GOAT standard — unbothered, undeniable, and undeniably elite. Our roster spans hip-hop, Afrobeats, electronic, and beyond.
label.description3: We don't just sign artists. We build legacies.

bookingFeatures.title: Live Performances
bookingFeatures.description: Full live shows with bands, backing tracks, and visuals

bookingFeatures.title: DJ Sets
bookingFeatures.description: Club nights, festivals, private events — our DJs go all night

bookingFeatures.title: Brand Partnerships
bookingFeatures.description: Artist endorsements, brand events, and media appearances
